  "type": "VIDEO",

  "videoTitle": "Security Architecture Components Walkthrough",
  "content": "In this video, we will explore the essential components of security architecture that protect against various threats.",
  "videoWebUrl": "https://www.example.com/security-architecture-components",
  "bullets": [
    "Understand the role of Perimeter Security in safeguarding network boundaries.",
    "Learn how Network Segmentation limits access and reduces vulnerabilities.",
    "Identify different Threat Actors and their motivations, especially State Sponsored Actors targeting critical infrastructure.",
    "Review key concepts from previous lessons to reinforce understanding."
  ]
}
